# Prabakaran — Full Stack Software Engineer

> Full Stack Software Engineer with 3 years of experience building and shipping
> production web applications end-to-end with Next.js, React, TypeScript, Node.js
> and tRPC / oRPC. Founder and sole engineer of CrayonSparks, a live AI SaaS.
> Based in India · Available for new opportunities.

## About

Prabakaran M is a Full Stack Software Engineer specializing in type-safe,
AI-powered web applications. At Darthwares (July 2023–present) he builds
type-safe APIs, role-based access control (RBAC) and AI features serving
2,500+ users across enterprise and ed-tech products. He independently designed,
built and deployed CrayonSparks — an AI book SaaS with a multi-provider AI
pipeline (OpenAI + Google Gemini), subscription billing and cloud storage.

- Name: Prabakaran M
- Role: Full Stack Software Engineer
- Experience: 3 years
- Location: India (Tiruppur / Coimbatore)
- Email: prabakaran.m0208@gmail.com
- Status: Open to full-time roles

## Skills

- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3, SQL (basics)
- Frontend: Next.js, React.js, Redux, Recoil, Jotai, Tailwind CSS, SEO
- Backend & APIs: Node.js, Express.js, tRPC, oRPC, REST APIs, Server Actions, Firebase Admin, Webhooks, Sanity CMS
- AI & Integrations: OpenAI, Google Gemini, Vercel AI SDK, LemonSqueezy (billing)
- Cloud & Storage: Vercel, Netlify, Cloudflare R2, AWS S3, Cloudinary
- Databases: MongoDB, Firebase / Firestore
- Testing & Tooling: Jest, Playwright, Postman, Sentry, Git, GitHub

## Projects

- [CrayonSparks](https://www.crayonsparks.com/): AI book SaaS (Founder & sole engineer). Turns prompts into print-ready story, coloring and activity books. Next.js 16, React 19, oRPC, Firebase, OpenAI + Gemini, LemonSqueezy, Cloudflare R2.
- [LeetCampus](https://www.leetcampus.com/): AI-powered college academic & placement platform serving 2,500+ students. Next.js, TypeScript, Firebase, tRPC, Jotai.
- [LeetCV](https://www.leetcv.com/): AI-powered resume builder with shareable Leet Link. Next.js, TypeScript, Firebase, tRPC, Recoil.
- [Ennuviz](https://www.ennuviz.com/): Enterprise digital-transformation website. Next.js, TypeScript, Sanity CMS, Tailwind CSS.
